mapper.select: select case when ll.value is null then 0 else ll.value end value, rr.label_name as name, rr.label_level as id from (select labellevel as id, count(distinct labelcode) as value from synlte.labels group by labellevel) ll right join DSM_LABEL_CODE_TABLE rr on ll.id = rr.label_level order by rr.label_level asc

SELECT CASE WHEN o.cnt IS NOT NULL AND o.cnt > 0 THEN labelname || '(' || o.cnt || ')' ELSE labelname || '(0)' END AS label, labelcode AS value FROM (SELECT * FROM synlte.labels WHERE labellevel = #{labelLevel}) l LEFT JOIN (SELECT value, cnt FROM (SELECT value, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN LENGTH(sjzybq1) = '1' THEN '100' || sjzybq1 ELSE sjzybq1 END AS value FROM synlte.object WHERE deleted = 0 AND UPPER(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' AND sjzybq1 IS NOT NULL) t GROUP BY value ORDER BY value) a UNION ALL SELECT value, cnt FROM (SELECT value, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN LENGTH(sjzybq2) = '1' THEN '200' || sjzybq2 ELSE sjzybq2 END AS value FROM synlte.object WHERE deleted = 0 AND UPPER(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' AND sjzybq2 IS NOT NULL) t GROUP BY value ORDER BY value) b UNION ALL SELECT value, cnt FROM (SELECT value, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN LENGTH(sjzybq3) = '1' THEN '300' || sjzybq3 ELSE sjzybq3 END AS value FROM synlte.object WHERE deleted = 0 AND UPPER(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' AND sjzybq3 IS NOT NULL) t GROUP BY value ORDER BY value) c UNION ALL SELECT value, cnt FROM (SELECT value, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN LENGTH(sjzybq4) = '1' THEN '400' || sjzybq4 ELSE sjzybq4 END AS value FROM synlte.object WHERE deleted = 0 AND UPPER(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' AND sjzybq4 IS NOT NULL) t GROUP BY value ORDER BY value) d UNION ALL SELECT value, cnt FROM (SELECT value, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN LENGTH(sjzybq5) = '1' THEN '500' || sjzybq5 ELSE sjzybq5 END AS value FROM synlte.object WHERE deleted = 0 AND UPPER(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' AND sjzybq5 IS NOT NULL) t GROUP BY value ORDER BY value) e UNION ALL SELECT value, cnt FROM (SELECT value, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN LENGTH(sjzybq6) = '1' THEN '600' || sjzybq6 ELSE sjzybq6 END AS value FROM synlte.object WHERE deleted = 0 AND UPPER(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' AND sjzybq6 IS NOT NULL) t GROUP BY value ORDER BY value) f) o ON l.labelcode = o.value
